content:
# Micro Fracture

**Summary**: Small fractures in the rock matrix that enhance permeability.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-gomaa|Gomaa, 2019]] investigated micro-fractures generated by thermochemical pressure pulses.

- [[2020-mohammed|Mohammed, 2020]] investigated micro-fracture generation via thermochemical treatment.

## Scientific Context

- [[2019-gomaa|Gomaa, 2019]] Micro-fractures are key to enhancing permeability in tight formations.

- [[2020-mohammed|Mohammed, 2020]] investigated micro-fracture generation via thermochemical treatment.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2019-gomaa|Gomaa, 2019]] identified via NMR scan peak analysis.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Pressure pulse of 2,075 psi was expected to generate tiny micro-fractures to improve flow capacity. ([[2019-gomaa|Gomaa, 2019, p. 135]])


- The generated heat and pressure due to thermochemical treatment induced permanent fractures in the shale matrix. ([[2020-mohammed|Mohammed, 2020, p. 192]])
